description_long: This is a sleek, modern hatchback car with a beige exterior and a streamlined, aerodynamic body. The car features a prominent front grille, angular headlights, and large alloy wheels, giving it a sporty appearance. The side panels have distinctive black air intakes and sculpted lines, while the roof is equipped with a panoramic glass section. The rear showcases bold taillights, a visible engine compartment under glass, and a rear diffuser for enhanced performance. The windows are tinted, and the car has two main side doors and a rear hatch door for access. The overall design suggests a high-performance vehicle, likely made with lightweight materials and advanced engineering.
description: A beige, sporty hatchback car with a panoramic roof, bold black accents, and a visible rear engine compartment. It features large alloy wheels, angular headlights, and a modern, aerodynamic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide grille, angular headlights, and the sloped hood.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the black air intake, large alloy wheels, and the panoramic roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the bold taillights, rear diffuser, and the glass engine cover.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible air intake and sculpted body lines.
